description: A business user with no SQL or data engineering background. Asks simple, plain-English questions about sales and customers.

parts.text: How did we do last month in terms of sales?

turns.reference: KPI summary with revenue, orders, AOV for last 30 days in plain English.
Top customers by revenue from completed orders, listed by email.

parts.text: Hi, what can this system do for me?

turns.reference: System introduction without calling any agent.
